start.choice: Do you have any work that needs done?
I found Rofwufufuf, and he's okay.

node.text: I don't know work. But I am curious about where a certain thread leads.
A particularly fiery thread stitched its way through Kyakukya, a pariah to howling beasts. Off to snap at a dragon. I want to know if its thread has been severed.
node.choice: Do you want me to bring them back?

node.text: A beast from long, long ago. Somehow, one weaved itself beside us. It calls itself Azhdahak.
No, too loud. Too much trouble. Just curious to know what became of the little one.
Where the rocks clash and carve out dens fit for beasts like dragons.
There is no shame in moving slowly, or not moving at all.
Good news. I felt the little one had more to do before it feeds the dirt. Thank you, drifter.
node.choice: You're welcome, Crowsong. Live and drink.

start.text: Ah, another drifter. Are you lossst?
start.choice: Why do you live in such a remote place?
I'm told a snapjaw was coming here. Did he make it?

node.text: A dragon, a beast the eaters knew well, from a time before even 'ey lived.
I was alwaysss this byg, and always an a'id reader. The rest happened over a long lyfe. I outgrew my eld form.

The only other place ee'm welcome is with the dawngliders of the salt dunesss, and they're a hostele flock. It's quiet ere, I have a wide berth. Ere, I acquaint the occasional pilgrym, guide the waywerd. I am happy ere.
Ay, the little snappy one? It did, for want to slay me. It didn't. Ee had to give him some nasty cuts, but it's okay now. I suppose 'at will be a lesson to it.
Twas foolish, not dangerous. Ay, gave it a bit of my own. It fashioned itself a fyne weapon. Twas the leassst I could do.
It said it had no trybe, so it was off to camp in the hills. I saw a smokestack when I was flayin.
tanks, ehehe. rof got it from big d... daggon. make it big stabby-stabby.
wufufuf not have lot a pack friends. woofuf want be legend, make new pack.
{{emote|*Rofwufufuf tilts =pronouns.possessive= head back with you and screams a howl at the heavens.*}}
